title: Senior Software Engineer - Aptech - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Aptech - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Aptech. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Chennai-based team.

About Aptech:
Aptech is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aptech!
jsonLd.skills: AWS, TypeScript, Python, CI/CD, Agile/Scrum, Machine Learning, Microservices, SQL
